text: As I observe this bright, modern space, I find myself drawn toward curiosity and reflection. The glass barrier creates a sense of separation between the outside world and the interior of the exhibition, inviting me to consider what knowledge or innovation lies within. Spaces like these make me ponder the boundaries between the known and the unknown, the observer and the observed. Despite its openness and light, there is a sense of anticipation—the promise of discovery just beyond the transparent threshold.
